description_long: This is a medium-height, rectangular wooden shelving unit with a simple, open design. It features four horizontal shelves, each supported by vertical side panels, providing ample storage or display space. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a warm, natural appearance suitable for both indoor and semi-outdoor urban environments. The back is fully enclosed, while the sides and front are open, allowing easy access to the shelves. The construction appears sturdy, with no visible doors, handles, or glass panels. Its minimalist style makes it versatile for use in garages, offices, or public spaces such as libraries or community centers.
description: A medium-height, open wooden shelving unit with four shelves and a natural wood finish. It has a minimalist, sturdy design with open sides and front for easy access.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves and the full height of the unit, with visible wood grain and no doors or handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and the open structure, with vertical side panels and no enclosed sides.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel and the overall rectangular shape, with no openings or features on the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the open shelves and vertical side panel.
